goal: Refactor bills, debts, savings, budget, and category forms to use shadcn/ui components

tasks.name: Refactor bill-form.tsx and debt-form.tsx
microSteps: bill-form: Replace <input type='date'> with DatePicker (name='next_due')
bill-form: Replace frequency <select> with Select component
bill-form: Replace category/account <select> with Combobox components
bill-form: Replace name/amount <input> with Input, <label> with Label, <button> with Button
bill-form: Preserve server action and edit mode defaultValues
debt-form: Replace type <select> with Select (4 debt types)
debt-form: Replace name/balance/interest/min_payment <input> with Input
debt-form: Replace conditional owed_to <input> with Input
debt-form: Replace <label> with Label, <button> with Button
debt-form: Preserve useState for type-based conditional rendering
Run type check and build

tdd.reason: UI component swap — verified via type check, build, and manual testing

tasks.action: Refactor bill-form (6 controls: name, amount, frequency select, date, category combobox, account combobox) and debt-form (6+ controls: name, type select, balance, interest, min_payment, conditional owed_to). Both use server actions via prop. Preserve bill-form's frequency enum labels and debt-form's conditional rendering based on debt type useState.

tasks.name: Refactor goal-form.tsx and add-budget-form.tsx
microSteps: goal-form: Replace <input type='date'> with DatePicker (optional deadline)
goal-form: Replace account <select> with Combobox (optional)
goal-form: Replace name/target_amount <input> with Input, <label> with Label, <button> with Button
goal-form: Preserve server action and edit mode defaultValues
add-budget-form: Replace category <select> with Select (filtered list)
add-budget-form: Replace amount <input> with Input
add-budget-form: Replace <button> with Button
add-budget-form: Preserve useActionState pattern and toast calls
Run type check and build

tdd.reason: UI component swap — verified via type check, build, and manual testing

tasks.action: Refactor goal-form (4 controls: name, target_amount, optional deadline date, optional account select) and add-budget-form (3 controls: category select, amount input, submit button with hidden month). goal-form: date → DatePicker, account → Combobox, inputs → Input. add-budget-form: category → Select (uses filtered category list), input → Input, button → Button. Preserve useActionState and toast.success/error calls in add-budget-form.

tasks.name: Refactor category-form.tsx
microSteps: Replace parent category <select> with Select component
Replace name <input> with Input component
Upgrade color radio buttons to styled color picker using Button variant='outline' with color-coded backgrounds
Replace <label> with Label, submit <button> with Button
Preserve useActionState pattern (pending state, error display, auto-close on success)
Preserve 9-color preset array and radio group behavior
Run type check and build

tdd.reason: UI component swap — verified via type check, build, and manual testing

tasks.action: Refactor category-form which has the most complex UI (color picker with 9 presets, hierarchical parent select, useActionState with auto-close). Replace parent <select> → Select, name <input> → Input, <label> → Label, submit <button> → Button. For color radio buttons: keep the custom radio group pattern but style with shadcn Button variant='outline' for each color swatch, adding a ring/border highlight on selected. Preserve all useActionState logic.

commitMessage: feat(ui): refactor bill, debt, savings, budget, and category forms to shadcn/ui components
